sourcesContent:
<template>
  <header class="app-header">
    <button class="brand" type="button" @click="$router.push('/')">Codemong</button>
    <nav>
      <button
        v-for="item in navigation"
        :key="item.key"
        type="button"
        :class="{ active: item.key === activePage }"
        @click="$router.push(item.path)"
      >
        {{ item.label }}
      </button>
    </nav>
    <button class="primary small" type="button" @click="$router.push('/login')">GitHub 로그인</button>
  </header>
</template>

<script>
import { getNavigation } from '../api/codemong'

export default {
  name: 'AppHeader',
  props: {
    activePage: {
      type: String,
      default: '',
    },
  },
  data() {
    return {
      navigation: getNavigation(),
    }
  },
}
</script>
